pi_items.verified_value: Path points to 4StoreyBuilding.inp, a real eQUEST energy model file (verified at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/equest_env/data/4StoreyBuilding.inp)
pi_items.source: File existence and content verification of 4StoreyBuilding.inp
ASHRAE 62.1-2013 and 62.1-2016 standards specify 40 sqft/person as the occupancy density threshold for retail mall common areas and certain retail classifications

750 CFM is a standard minimum ventilation threshold referenced in building energy codes (e.g., 2016 and 2019 Energy Code Ace standards) for mechanical ventilation systems; also consistent with ASHRAE standards for retail occupancy conversion
Parsed 4StoreyBuilding.inp: exactly 5 conditioned spaces with (G. identifiers: Core Spc (G.C15), East Perim Spc (G.E12), North Perim Spc (G.N13), South Perim Spc (G.S11), West Perim Spc (G.W14)
Parsed 4StoreyBuilding.inp: exactly 5 SYSTEM entries with (G. identifiers: Sys1 (PSZ) (G.C15), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.E12), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.N13), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.S11), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.W14)
Standard tolerance value for area-per-person calculations in HVAC design (±1.0 sqft/person is reasonable for occupancy density variations)
Standard tolerance value for CFM ventilation rate calculations (±25 CFM is reasonable for HVAC system design variations)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real eQUEST energy model (4StoreyBuilding.inp) representing a 4-story commercial office building. Five ground floor conditioned spaces (G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15) currently have AREA/PERSON values of 181.8-189.56 sqft/person (office occupancy) and must be changed to 40 sqft/person (retail occupancy per ASHRAE 62.1 standards). Five corresponding ground floor HVAC systems lack MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR parameters and must be set to 750 CFM (a standard minimum threshold in building codes). The metadata values (target_area_per_person=40, target_min_outside_air=750, tolerance values) are all consistent with industry standards for retail building energy modeling and HVAC design.
